events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: From 'Bohemian Rhapsody' to 'We Will Rock You', Brian May's iconic guitar work has defined generations. What's your favourite Queen riff?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, marks his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Enduring Legend
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! What's the ultimate Rolling Stones track that gets you dancing?

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' famously being the first video ever played.

angles.name: MTV's Impact
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV changed music forever. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give it a new lease of life? We're still here!

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, which quickly became a Britpop defining record.

angles.name: Britpop Anthem
angles.copy: 'Definitely Maybe' landed in '94 and launched Oasis into the stratosphere. What's the album track you still crank up today?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which iconic performance would you have loved to see live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering 'The King of Rock and Roll', Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: On the anniversary of his passing, we celebrate the enduring legacy of Elvis Presley. What's your go-to track from The King?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: On this day in 1996, influential rapper Tupac Shakur was tragically shot dead in Las Vegas. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, a voice that shaped a generation, 30 years on from his passing. His music and message live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: A true pioneer, Jimi Hendrix left us too soon, but his groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: Anniversary of Beatles' Abbey Road (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in 1969, featuring the legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 'Abbey Road' dropped in '69, giving us one of music's most recognisable album covers and timeless tracks. What's your favourite moment from the record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th to the unmistakable voice of Chrissie Hynde! From 'Brass in Pocket' to 'I'll Stand By You', what's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and iconic former Oasis frontman, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock N Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th to the one and only Liam Gallagher! What's your favourite Oasis anthem delivered by his distinctive vocals?

events.title: Anniversary of John Lennon releasing 'Imagine' (1975)
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK on this day in 1975, following its initial 1971 US release.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 'Imagine' a world... John Lennon's timeless message of peace still resonates today. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: Anniversary of Apple's first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music by putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It changed everything for music lovers! What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Today marks James Bond Day, celebrating the release of the very first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Who's your favourite 007 and which Bond theme tune is the ultimate classic?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering The Beatles' co-founder, John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we celebrate the incredible songwriting and enduring spirit of John Lennon. What's your favourite Lennon lyric?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary British comedian, actor, and writer, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Happy 87th to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's his most unforgettable moment for you?

events.title: Anniversary of The Beatles' 'White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their experimental and self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Wonders
angles.copy: It's 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A double LP with everything from rock to folk – what's your standout track?
